revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:石部神社]]
'''Isobe Shrine''' (石部神社, ''Isobe Jinja'').
* {{ill|Isobe Shrine (Komatsu City)|lt=Isobe Shrine (Komatsu City)|lt=Isobe Shrine (Komatsu)|ja|石部神社 (小松市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isobe Shrine (Komatsu)|qq=}} ({{ill|Komatsu, Ishikawa|en|Komatsu, Ishikawa|qid=Q646898|lt=Komatsu|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}) - A Shikinaisha (Minor Shrine) listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. Former shrine Rank under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qid=Q712534|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}: Gōsha (Village Shrine). * {{ill|Isobe Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|石部神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isobe Shrine (Toyooka)|qq=}} ({{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|en|Toyooka, Hyōgo|qid=Q696388|lt=Toyooka|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}) - A Shikinaisha (Minor Shrine). Former shrine Rank: Gōsha (Village Shrine).
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|石部神社|version=39192406|comment=Imported full ja history}}
